events.appearance_notes: High activity; A man in white clothes is squatting in the last row of the bus with his back to the seat.
events.event_text: From 0.7s to 9.5s, a man in white clothes is squatting in the last row of the bus with his back to the seat.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The man sat down in the last row of the car, lit something on his hand, and threw it on the seat. The seat caught fire.
events.event_text: From 10.6s to 27.7s, the man sat down in the last row of the car, lit something on his hand, and threw it on the seat. The seat caught fire.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The man got up and walked away, got out of the car in the middle of the car and left.
events.event_text: From 31.7s to 39.0s, the man got up and walked away, got out of the car in the middle of the car and left.
